Who We Are

Education That Opens Doors

International Education Camp (IEC) is a registered education company operating across 6 countries — Italy, Ireland, Spain, Greece, England and Scotland — pioneering language immersion programmes that build confidence, cultural intelligence, and lifelong skills through unforgettable real-world experiences.

🌏

Counsellors from 20+ Nationalities

Our camps are led by volunteer counsellors from Hong Kong, South Africa, Jamaica, the Philippines, Ireland, the UK, Canada and beyond — giving every student genuine cross-cultural immersion from day one.

🤝

True Internationalisation for Your School

We bring the world to your students — without the cost or complexity of overseas travel. A diverse, multilingual counsellor team delivers a fully international experience right inside your school's environment.

🚀

Premium Learning Partnerships

Every IEC camp combines live immersion with The English Habit's online platform and Mr Cat Books' award-winning resources — trusted by leading state, private and international schools across Europe.

🇮🇹🇪🇺

EU PON Affiliation

IEC programmes in Italy carry an affiliation with the PON (Programma Operativo Nazionale) European funding framework — available for eligible state schools upon request.

PON Accredited ✓
What We Offer

Immersive Programmes Built
to Transform

Every IEC programme is designed with one goal: to bring students further in a week than a full year in the classroom.

☀️🏫

English Summer Camp & School Partnership

IEC's flagship programme — a 2-week full English immersion day camp, delivered in partnership with the school. We design the whole experience and send a team of trained camp counsellors to welcome students locally and deliver it from the ground up. Students live the language every day, in every activity.

Get in Touch → 📅 Book a Call
  • 2-week full immersion day camp format
  • IEC team comes to your school — no travel needed
  • A school coordinator welcomes students locally
  • International counsellors from 17+ countries
  • Cultural activities, games, sports & workshops
  • Fully qualified English language tutors
  • Pre & post assessments with progress reports
  • Free 1-month The English Habit membership included
  • Mr Cat Books resources for every student
  • Certificate of achievement for every student
Exclusive Partnership

The English Habit:
Learning Doesn't Stop
at Camp

IEC has partnered with The English Habit — a leading online English language school — to ensure every student continues their immersion journey long after the camp ends.

100% of families report language improvement
1 Month free online membership for every student
Daily live sessions with qualified English teachers
Fluency proven pathway to real language fluency
🎁 EXCLUSIVE IEC INCLUSION

Every Camp Student Gets a Free Month of The English Habit

When students leave camp, their English journey doesn't stop. Every IEC student receives a full complimentary month of The English Habit's online platform — connecting them with qualified English teachers for daily conversation practice.

  • ✓
    Daily live speaking sessions
  • ✓
    Fully qualified English language teachers
  • ✓
    Continue the immersion at home
  • ✓
    Proven to accelerate fluency
  • ✓
    100% of families see improvements

The Learning Journey

From first word to full fluency

A structured pathway that takes students from classroom beginners to confident English speakers — through immersion, practice, and community.

← Drag the path or click a step →

01
Step 01
02
Step 02
03
Step 03
Step 01
English Summer Camp
2-week full immersion. Counsellors from 20+ countries come to your school.
Step 02
The English Habit
Online language school — structured English lessons with qualified teachers, year-round.
🌍
Step 03
Full Fluency
C1 / C2 level — career ready, globally confident, life-changing.
Step 01 Summer
☀️ English Summer Camp
IEC's flagship 2-week full English immersion day camp, delivered in partnership with the school. International counsellors from 20+ countries come to the students — no travel needed.
Confidence
A2
Full Immersion 2 Weeks 20+ Countries
Step 02 Online
The English Habit
Our partner online language school, keeping momentum going year-round with structured English lessons online. Short daily lessons, live sessions with qualified English teachers, and a proven method for real, measurable progress.
Confidence
B1
Daily Practice Live Lessons Year-round
Step 03 Goal
🌍 Full Fluency
Students emerge with the confidence, vocabulary, and cultural fluency to thrive in international classrooms, careers, and life beyond borders.

Our Team

Counsellors from Every Corner of the World

Our camp counsellors are the beating heart of IEC — a truly global team of passionate educators and language leaders who bring the English experience to life every single day.

🇬🇧 United Kingdom 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿 Wales 🇮🇪 Ireland 🇭🇰 Hong Kong 🇿🇦 South Africa 🇯🇲 Jamaica 🇹🇹 Trinidad & Tobago 🇬🇲 The Gambia 🇵🇪 Peru 🇨🇦 Canada 🇺🇸 North America 🌎 South America 🇵🇭 Philippines 🇹🇭 Thailand 🇮🇳 India 🇱🇰 Sri Lanka + & many more

🌍 South Africa

"Volunteering with IEC has been one of the most rewarding experiences of my life. Watching students arrive shy and uncertain, then leave two weeks later laughing and joking in English with kids from five different countries — that transformation is extraordinary."

Activity Leader

Language Programme Lead

Our Footprint

6 Countries. One Mission.

From 50+ Italian partner schools to growing networks in Ireland, Spain, Greece, England and Scotland — IEC is building the next generation of global communicators, one camp at a time.

🇮🇹

Italy 50+

Our largest market. Over 50 partner schools, EU PON funded, making world-class English immersion accessible to thousands of Italian students every year.

🇬🇷

Greece

A growing network of partner schools bringing IEC's immersive programmes to Greek students — combining rich culture with real English fluency.

🇪🇸

Spain

Spanish partner schools join IEC to give their students a truly multicultural immersion experience alongside peers from across Europe.

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿

England

IEC has historically brought student groups on cultural tours across England — visiting iconic landmarks, experiencing British culture first-hand and deepening their English language journey in the country where the language was born.

🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

Scotland

From Edinburgh's historic closes to the stunning Scottish Highlands, IEC has taken student groups on unforgettable cultural tours of Scotland — pairing stunning scenery with immersive English language experiences.

🇮🇪

Ireland

Ireland's rich storytelling tradition and warm-hearted culture make it a perfect destination for IEC cultural tours. Student groups have explored Dublin, the Wild Atlantic Way and beyond — speaking English every step of the journey.

🗺️✈️

Interested in a Cultural Tour to England, Scotland or Ireland?

We'd love to help you plan a bespoke group tour for next summer. Get in touch and our team will put together a tailor-made itinerary that combines language immersion with unforgettable cultural experiences.

Get in Touch →
Strategic Partnerships

Built on the Best Collaborations

We've assembled a portfolio of world-class partners who share our commitment to innovative, impactful education.

The English Habit

An industry-leading online English school that provides IEC students with a free month of daily live sessions with qualified English teachers — proven to accelerate fluency and maintain the momentum of camp immersion.

Visit The English Habit
Mr Cat Books

Mr Cat Books

Award-winning educational language resources from Mr Cat Books — engaging, innovative, and specially curated to support young English learners. Our students get access to these acclaimed books as part of their IEC learning journey.

Discover Mr Cat Books
🇪🇺

PON Ricerca — European Union

IEC programmes in Italy are associated with the EU's PON (Programma Operativo Nazionale) funding initiative — ensuring European-quality education reaches schools in every region of Italy, regardless of socioeconomic background.

Learn About PON Funding

TalentlyED Ltd

Our UK-based recruitment and education partner, TalentlyED Ltd, helps us attract and place the best camp counsellors and educators from around the world — ensuring every IEC camp delivers an unmatched standard of care and teaching.

Join Through TalentlyED
IEC Recommended Reading

Learning with Mr Cat Books

Every IEC student has access to the acclaimed Mr Cat Books series — engaging language resources that make English learning feel like an adventure. Bright, bold, and brilliantly effective for young learners, these books complement our in-person immersion with resources that go home with students and keep the learning alive all year round.

Explore Mr Cat Books

Volunteer with Our World-Class Camp Counsellor Team

We're looking for passionate, energetic educators and language enthusiasts from around the world to join the IEC family as volunteers. If you love volunteering with young people, have a flair for languages, and want to spend your summer in Europe making a real difference — we want to hear from you.

  • Volunteer alongside an international team of educators from every continent
  • Stay with a host family & immerse yourself in the local culture
  • Live, teach and grow in Italy, Spain, Greece, Ireland, England or Scotland
  • Meals & accommodation provided, plus a volunteer stipend
  • Full training and ongoing professional support
  • Be part of a mission-driven team changing young lives
  • Partnered with TalentlyED Ltd for volunteer placement and compliance
